layout.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#0B192C] text-white hidden md:flex flex-col h-screen fixed border-r border-[#1A2B4C]
layout.main_content: ml-0 md:ml-64 p-6 md:p-8 bg-[#F8FAFC] min-h-screen
layout.table_container: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

components.table: High-density SaaS table pattern. Use condensed heights (40px) for rows. Sticky header with bg-slate-50. Limit initial columns to essentials. Wrap in a card with subtle shadow.
components.badges: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. Use status_colors mapped above for PPL, CPL, IR, FIC, and ME stages.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F4A261] text-white hover:bg-[#E78A43] transition-colors rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 text-[#0B192C] hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (e.g., hover:bg-slate-50 for table rows).

images.description: Cockpit view for immersive login screen background
Small airplane taxiing, useful for empty states or dashboard welcome card

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout. Sidebar uses Navy (#0B192C) with white text, and Soft Orange (#F4A261) for active states/CTAs.
Implement a dense schedule board (table) supporting list/table view per period. Follow high-density table patterns: sticky headers, condensed rows.
Implement CRUD forms for Instructors, Students, Aircraft, and Stages using Shadcn Dialog, Form, and Select components.
Create a notification center/dropdown for License Expiry alerts (highlight instructors/students expiring next month).
Use the exact color-coded badges provided in the colors.status_colors section for flight stages (PPL, CPL, IR, FIC, ME).
Add a filter for aircraft based on their insurance status.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust automated testing.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons (e.g., plane, users, calendar, bell).
All forms and interactive UI elements must use the required Shadcn components, explicitly customized to the Light theme colors specified.
